description: aspire init now delegates repo scanning, project discovery, AppHost wiring, and OTel setup to an agent skill (aspireify). The command drops a skeleton AppHost and aspire.config.json, then the skill completes the wiring for both C# and TypeScript AppHosts. A new aspirify eval playground provides rubrics for benchmarking the skill on real-world apps.
name: aspire init delegates wiring to the aspireify agent skill
